top_signals.title: Unknown hacker group targeted Russian maritime universities, diplomats for nearly two years
top_signals.summary: More than half of the attacks observed over the past year targeted educational institutions, particularly maritime universities and schools that train personnel for Russia's shipping, inland waterway and fishing industries.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.summary: Japan Confirms Yen Intervention Over Past Month, Spending Record Sum  WSJ
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: The Tax Math That Changes Whether You Should Own or Lease Your Truck
top_signals.summary:
A Note Before We Start Tax law is not a place for general advice to substitute for specific counsel. The concepts in this article are educational. The numbers used are illustrative. top_signals.title: Short Seller Andrew Left Found Guilty of Securities Fraud
top_signals.summary: Andrew Left, one of the world’s most prominent short sellers, was found guilty of securities fraud by a federal jury after a landmark trial that scrutinized his use of social media to move the price of stocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Grayscale sets 0.29% fee for its Hyperliquid ETF, undercutting Bitwise and 21Shares
top_signals.summary: Grayscale is set to launch its own Hyperliquid exchange-traded fund as soon as this week, setting a sponsor fee of 0.29%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
